claim_boundary: Phase 5 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase5_goal: Group normalized Phase 4 records by category/source type, identify possible comparison pairs, and label comparison readiness without claiming contradiction detection or factual resolution.
purpose: Move from normalized bounded samples to cautious cross-source comparison scaffolding without resolving truth or creating alerts.
required_gates: Gate 1: load Phase 4 normalized records only
Gate 2: group records by category and source_type
Gate 3: identify possible comparison candidates without asserting agreement or contradiction
Gate 7: no alerts, truth claims, production monitoring, or autonomous action
